creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Closing this issue. Didn't get feedback on suggestions.

- LTO can be disabled as a build option. Does this help?

- The official FreeBSD pkg builders compile cleanly.
- MongoDB is a huge program. So you need enough resources and patients to build it.
- Upstream is a commercial company. I'm not going to do their work. I'm only creating the port. But the Mongo company is responsive to bug reports: https://jira.mongodb.org/ .
